briefdescription.para: Bad signature.
Nonce too low.
Nonce too high.
Sending account had too low a balance.
Block is full, no more extrinsics can be applied.
inherent data encode/decode error codes
The call of the transaction is not expected.

detaileddescription.para: General error to do with the inability to pay some fees (e.g. account balance too low).
General error to do with the transaction not yet being valid (e.g. nonce too high).
General error to do with the transaction being outdated (e.g. nonce too low).

briefdescription.para: General error to do with the transaction's proofs (e.g. signature).
The transaction birth block is ancient.

detaileddescription.para: The transaction would exhaust the resources of current block.
The transaction might be valid, but there are not enough resources left in the current block.

briefdescription.para: Any other custom invalid validity that is not covered by this enum.
Transaction is invalid. Details are described by the error code.

detaileddescription.para: Could not lookup some information that is required to validate the transaction.

briefdescription.para: No validator found for the given unsigned transaction.
Any other custom unknown validity that is not covered by this enum.
An unknown transaction validity.
SubscriptionId primitive.
Metadata primitive.
ExtrinsicKey is used as a key to search extrinsic.
Block id is the variant over BlockHash and BlockNumber.
Verification engine unique ID.

detaileddescription.para: System digest item that contains the root of changes trie at given block. It is created for every block iff runtime supports changes trie creation.

memberdef.type: boost::variant< Unused< 0 >, Unused< 1 >, ChangesTrieRoot, Unused< 3 >, Verification, Seal, PreRuntime >
memberdef.definition: using sgns::primitives::DigestItem = boost::variant<Unused<0>, Unused<1>, ChangesTrieRoot, Unused<3>, Verification, Seal, PreRuntime>
memberdef.name: DigestItem

detaileddescription.para: Digest item that is able to encode/decode 'system' digest items and provide opaque access to other items. Note: order of types in variant matters. Should match type ids from here:
Digest is an implementation- and usage-defined entity, for example, information, needed to verify the block
Index of an extrinsic in a block
SuperGenius primitive, which is opaque representation of RuntimeMetadata
Information on a transaction's validity and, if valid, on how it relate to other transactions.

briefdescription.para: The identity of a particular API interface that the runtime might provide.

detaileddescription.para: This is the same structure as RuntimeVersion from substrate

briefdescription.para: single Api item
A vector of pairs of ApiId and a u32 for version.
outputs object of type AuthorityId to stream
decodes object of type AuthorityId from stream
outputs object of type Authority to stream
decodes object of type Authority from stream
outputs object of type Block to stream
decodes object of type Block from stream
compares two BlockData instances
outputs object of type BlockData to stream
decodes object of type BlockData from stream
Outputs a BlockHeader to an encoding stream.
Decodes a BlockHeader from a decoding stream.
outputs object of type Extrinisic to stream
decodes object of type Extrinisic from stream
output InherentData object instance to stream
decodes InherentData object instance from stream
compares two Justification instances
outputs object of type Justification to stream
decodes object of type Justification from stream
outputs object of type Valid to stream
decodes object of type Valid from stream
outputs object of type Version to stream
decodes object of type Version from stream
